title: Java Head
writer: Martin Brown, Joseph Hergesheimer, Gordon Wellesley
actors: Anna May Wong, Elizabeth Allan, John Loder
plot: The port city of Bristol, England, in the 1800s is home to Java Head, a sailing ship line company. The owner has two sons. One, a handsome seafarer, is in love with a local girl, but cannot marry her due to a long-running feud bet...
